g.title: TED_QSP
g.text: Thyroid Eye Disease (TED / Graves' Orbitopathy, 갑상선眼병증) — Integrated QSP Mechanistic Map
TSHR-IGF-1R Autoimmune Crosstalk → Orbital Fibroblast Activation → GAG/Hyaluronan Edema, Adipogenesis & Fibrosis → Proptosis, Diplopia, DON
Teprotumumab (IGF-1R mAb) · IV Methylprednisolone/Prednisone · Rituximab (anti-CD20) · Tocilizumab (anti-IL-6R) · Selenium · Orbital Decompression/RT

g.title: cluster_pk_other
g.text: 10. Drug PK/PD — Glucocorticoid, Rituximab, Tocilizumab, Selenium
